chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1223 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 954/20 3.For orders on CMA 4961/19 4.For hearing of CMA 4962/19 5.For hearing of main case. 21-02-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Shar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondents-SIDA. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G a/w Muneer Soomro, XEN, Tubewell Division, Ghotki. ***** Petitioner has filed this petition for release of his salaries claiming to be employee of respondents-SIDA. In the comments, respondents have stated that appointment of the petitioner was fake. On the last date of hearing, when no one was present on behalf of petitioner, the case was adjourned to today as a last and final chance. Today, learned counsel for petitioner has refused to argue the matter and seeks time. However, we have perused the petition and heard the other parties and are of the view that after comments declaring petitioner’s appointment as fake, nothing is left in this petition to be decided on merits. The question of a fake appointment is factual one, which cannot be sorted out in this petition. If the petitioner claims otherwise, he may approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
